security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://openrouter.ai http://localhost:11434

bundle.longDescription: An AI-powered, privacy-first desktop app for managing your personal finances. Track transactions, budgets, investments, and subscriptions — all stored locally on your device.
